2026 Season Roster

The crew taking the field for Solutions Squad this season.

#1
1
Alex Rivera

Pitcher

Our ace on the mound. Fierce competitor with a killer rise ball.

#7
7
Jordan Kim

Catcher

The backbone behind the plate. Calls a smart game every night.

#12
12
Sam Torres

1st Base

Reliable glove and a power bat that keeps rallies alive.

#4
4
Morgan Hayes

2nd Base

Quick hands and quicker feet — turns double plays in a flash.

#9
9
Casey Nguyen

Shortstop

The heart of the infield. Nothing gets past this one.

#22
22
Taylor Brooks

3rd Base

Hot corner guardian with a cannon for an arm.

#17
17
Drew Patel

Left Field

Tracks down everything in the gap and leads off with speed.

#5
5
Quinn Flores

Center Field

Fleet-footed center fielder and team captain for three seasons.

#33
33
Reese Lawson

Right Field

Big bat off the bench or in the lineup — always clutch.

#10
10
Blake Okafor

Utility

Can play anywhere on the field. The team's Swiss Army knife.

#21
21
Avery Sinclair

Pitcher

Change-up specialist who keeps hitters guessing all game long.

#8
8
Sage Williams

Designated Hitter

Pure slugger. Steps up when the game is on the line.

SOLUTIONS SQUAD

A casual co-ed softball team bringing competitive spirit and good times to the Bloomington recreational league since 2019. Come out and cheer us on!
